constraint_statement: The logic shall generate brake_request when the warning state is EMERGENCY_BRAKE
The logic shall not generate brake_request when the state is SAFE or CAUTION
The logic shall classify EMERGENCY_BRAKE when TTC is below the emergency threshold
The brake_request shall remain linked to the critical warning state during the simplified scenario evaluation
The project shall clearly define the ODD and exclude unsupported operating conditions
The warning logic shall not remain SAFE when TTC or stopping-distance thresholds indicate risk
The logic shall avoid EMERGENCY_BRAKE in normal SAFE scenarios
Wet-road scenarios shall use wet-road friction assumptions
implementation_in_project: Implemented in scenario table and friction input

constraint_statement: Stopping-distance calculation shall include actuator delay assumptions
